# terrible_check_point_mgmt_cp_mgmt_threat_profile (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Object name.

### Optional

- `activate_protections_by_extended_attributes` (String) Activate protections by these extended attributes.
- `active_protections_performance_impact` (String) Protections with this performance impact only will be activated in the profile.
- `active_protections_severity` (String) Protections with this severity only will be activated in the profile.
- `anti_bot` (Boolean) Is Anti-Bot blade activated.
- `anti_virus` (Boolean) Is Anti-Virus blade activated.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `color` (String) Color of the object. Should be one of existing colors.
- `comments` (String) Comments string.
- `confidence_level_high` (String) Action for protections with high confidence level.
- `confidence_level_low` (String) Action for protections with low confidence level.
- `confidence_level_medium` (String) Action for protections with medium confidence level.
- `deactivate_protections_by_extended_attributes` (String) Deactivate protections by these extended attributes.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `details_level` (String) The level of detail for some of the fields in the response can vary from showing only the UID value of the object to a fully detailed representation of the object.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `ignore_warnings` (Boolean) Apply changes ignoring warnings.
- `indicator_overrides` (String) Indicators whose action will be overridden in this profile.
- `ips` (Boolean) Is IPS blade activated.
- `ips_settings` (String) IPS blade settings.
- `malicious_mail_policy_settings` (String) Malicious Mail Policy for MTA Gateways. Available from R80.20.M1 management version.
- `overrides` (String) Overrides per profile for this protection.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `threat_emulation` (Boolean) Is Threat Emulation blade activated.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `use_extended_attributes` (Boolean) Whether to activate/deactivate IPS protections according to the extended attributes.
- `use_indicators` (Boolean) Indicates whether the profile should make use of indicators.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `cp_mgmt_threat_profile` (String) The checkpoint object created or updated.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
